headline: Is Jeff Bezos’ New Startup An Even Bigger Idea than Amazon? He Tells CNBC it Will Drive ‘Civilizational Wealth.’
summary: Jeff Bezos sat down with CNBC on June 11, 2026, to make the case that his next act could become even bigger than Amazon. As co-founder and co-CEO of Prometheus, Bezos is pitching a thesis that tries to answer one question: What actually makes societies rich? His answer is invention. “What drives the wealth of ... Is Jeff Bezos’ New Startup An Even Bigger Idea than Amazon? He Tells CNBC it Will Drive ‘Civilizational Wealth.’
